sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Position 3 is at 6610c6, need to get to cddd7d (1 DOWN)
# But first let me check current state to make sure
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

def get_pink_pos(nodes, pos):
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'P' and n['pixels'] > 100:
            for c in n['children']:
                child = next(x for x in nodes if x['id'] == c)
                cols = [p[1] for p in child['boundary']]
                p = (min(cols) - 14) // 7
                if p == pos:
                    return child['hash']
    return None

top_p = {'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'fb80c9b281b063da', 'f4469c244897540c', '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', 'b4edb3faf810133b'}

print("Current state:")
for pos in range(5):
    h = get_pink_pos(nodes, pos)
    match = "MATCH" if h in top_p else "no match"
    print(f"  pos {pos}: {h[:12]}... ({match})")

# Try setting pos 3 to cddd7d (1 DOWN from 6610c6)
action(['DOWN'])

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
nodes2 = seg2['nodes']
print("\nAfter 1 DOWN on pos 3:")
for pos in range(5):
    h = get_pink_pos(nodes2, pos)
    match = "MATCH" if h in top_p else "no match"
    print(f"  pos {pos}: {h[:12]}... ({match})")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
